aws_spend.description: AWS cloud infrastructure costs by service and region.
example_prompts: What was our total AWS spend last quarter?
Show me cloud costs for Q1 2024
How much did we spend on Amazon Web Services this year?
What is our AWS bill for H1 2025?
Give me a breakdown of our cloud infrastructure spend

payroll.description: Employee salary, wages, and compensation data.
example_prompts: What was our total payroll cost last quarter?
Show me salary expenses for 2024
How much did we spend on employee compensation in Q2 2025?
What are our total wages and benefits for this year?
Give me a payroll summary for the fiscal year
What was our travel and expense spend last quarter?
Show me T&E costs for 2024
How much did employees spend on travel in Q3 2025?
What are our total travel reimbursements for this year?
Give me a breakdown of travel expenses by quarter

ma_deals.description: Mergers and acquisitions deal valuations and transaction data.
example_prompts: What was the total value of M&A deals last quarter?
Show me acquisition costs for 2024
How much did we spend on mergers and acquisitions in Q1 2025?
What is the total deal value for our M&A activity this year?
Give me a summary of merger transaction costs
